architecture.uml:
left to right direction actor "Radio Transmitter" as TX node Antenna node "Radio Demodulator"
TX -- Antenna --
Antenna -- "Radio Demodulator" --
architecture.description: Physical RF path showing broadcast reception from the external transmitter into the receiver hardware.

interface.description: The antenna receives the external radio broadcast.
interface.electrical: The RF path SHALL convey received broadcast energy from the antenna into the receiver circuit.

interface.description: The antenna feeds RF signal into the radio demodulator.
interface.electrical: The RF path SHALL couple the received broadcast signal from the antenna into the demodulator circuitry.
